title: Gemini 2.2 announced
description: Google announced Gemini 2.2 with improved agentic planning and multimodal performance.

title: AI Studio workflow upgrades
description: Google AI Studio added reusable workflow templates and evaluation runs for Gemini applications.

title: Gemma 3 family release
description: Google released Gemma 3 checkpoints with improved instruction tuning and multilingual quality.

title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 model card published
description: Google DeepMind published the Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 model card for an embodied-reasoning vision-language model based on Gemini 3.0 Flash, with up to 128k context over text, image, audio, and video inputs.

title: Gemini enterprise controls expanded
description: Google expanded admin controls, data handling policy options, and deployment governance for Gemini enterprise usage.

title: Gemma 4 highlighted by Google DeepMind
description: Google DeepMind highlighted Gemma 4 as its latest open-model family on the official news page, positioning it as a byte-efficient generation of Gemma models.

title: Google I/O 2026 day 1
description: Google I/O 2026 opens online May 19 with the Google keynote at 10:00am PT and the Developer keynote at 1:30pm PT, with Gemini and Android expected as headline developer topics.

title: Google I/O 2026 day 2
description: Second day of Google I/O 2026 livestreamed sessions and developer content, continuing the May 19-20 program for Gemini, Android, web, and cloud developers.
